text: Apple's recent financial performance shows mixed signals heading into the second half of 2025. Q3 revenue declined 1.39% year-over-year to $94.04 billion, while net income fell 5.43% to $23.43 billion, reflecting margin pressure despite the company's services growth momentum. Loop Capital analysts reported Apple shipped 45 million iPhones in Q2 2025, matching forecasts, as tariff concerns and aggressive promotions helped offset an otherwise flat global smartphone market. The company maintains strong profitability metrics with Q3 gross margin at 46.49% and operating margin at 29.99%, though investor sentiment has turned cautious.
